title: Goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) credit - calculation sheet for the July 2025 to June 2026 payments (2024 base year) - Canada.ca
content:
## Goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) credit - calculation sheet for the July 2025 to June 2026 payments (2024 base year)
PDF (130 kb) version
You can also use the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) - Child and benefits calculator .
Credit for spouse or common-law partner: ($349)
Credit for for the first eligible child in a single parent family: ($349)
Credit for eligible children: ($184 for each child not included on line 3)
4 $ Blank space for dollar value

## Calculation of additional credit Footnote 1
(complete only if you are a single individual)
Adjusted net income:
Line 5 minus line 6. If the result is negative, enter "0".
Additional credit: Enter $184 or 2% of line 7, whichever is less .
Subtotal: (add lines 1, 2, 3, 4 and 8)
(must be completed for single and married/common law individuals)
Adjusted family net income
Line 10 minus line 11. If the result is negative, enter "0".
12 $ Blank space for dollar value
All amounts are approximate. Your Notice of Determination will show your actual entitlement for the year.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
